title: 2025-12-12 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 6.28
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-12-12: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 6.28/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-12-12, the score printed 6.28/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
